headline: Buy 5 Large-Cap Stocks With Extensive Robotics Applications for 2H 2026
summary: Buy 5 large-cap robotics stocks, ISRG, TER, CDNS, MCHP and FTV for 2H 2026 supported by AI, automation and expanding robotics applications.
